description_long: This is a medium-sized, polygonal vase with a wide, flared mouth and a gently tapering body that narrows at the neck and base. The vase is predominantly a warm yellow color, with a decorative brown band featuring circular motifs near the rim. One side of the vase displays a playful cartoon illustration of a character in a white and red baseball uniform, holding a bat, adding a whimsical and contemporary touch. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting a ceramic or glazed finish. The interior is light-colored and likely hollow, suitable for holding flowers or decorative items. The overall design blends traditional vase shapes with modern, playful ornamentation.
description: A yellow, polygonal vase with a flared rim, brown decorative band, and a cartoon baseball character illustration. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, blending classic form with playful modern art.
description_view_0: The vase is seen from an angle showing the brown decorative band and a partial glimpse of the cartoon character on the side.
description_view_1: This view centers on the plain yellow body and brown band, with no visible cartoon illustration.
description_view_2: The vase is shown with the yellow body and brown band, with a hint of the cartoon character just coming into view on the right.
description_view_3: The front view prominently displays the cartoon baseball character, along with the brown decorative band and the full yellow body.
